function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read lane rulebooks, and used exact invoice records for auditable finance computation.
function.outcome_justification: The service line 'staff follow-up support' appears with line_eur 110 in INV-0007 (issued_on 2026-01-19) and 220 in INV-0008 (issued_on 2026-02-17). INV-0011 is issued_on 2026-04-27, which is after current context date 2026-03-31, so it is outside 'since beginning of January 2026' to present. Sum in range = 330.
